title: notoniopsis abyssinica
intro: Notoniopsis abyssinica is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Abyssinian notoniopsis or Abyssinian rue. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Notoniopsis abyssinica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive disorders. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in traditional medicine.
